title: Jalpeshwar Shiva temple
tagline: Jalpeshwar Shiva temple — spiritual town of West Bengal

overview.short: Jalpesh Temple (Rangpuri: zolpeś mondir, Bengali: jolpeś mondir) is an important Hindu temple dedicated to the Bhramari Saktipitha's Bhairava as Jalpesh.
overview.description: Jalpesh Temple (Rangpuri: zolpeś mondir, Bengali: jolpeś mondir) is an important Hindu temple dedicated to the Bhramari Saktipitha's Bhairava as Jalpesh. The worshiped in this temple is Bhairava as Jalpesh, a form of Shiva – one of Hinduism's trinity of supreme divinity. The temple is located on the banks of the Jarda river, 7–8 km from Mainaguri town in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Dakshin Khagrabari
topPlaces.description: Dakshin Khagrabari is a census town in the Maynaguri CD block in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Mainaguri
topPlaces.description: Mainaguri (also spelled Maynaguri) is a town and a municipality in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India. The town is located on the banks of the Jarda River.

topPlaces.name: Maynaguri (community development block)
topPlaces.description: Maynaguri is a community development block (CD block) that forms an administrative division in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Madhabdanga
topPlaces.description: Madhabdanga is a village located in Maynaguri CD block in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Barnesh
topPlaces.description: Barnesh (also spelled Barnes, Barnis or Barnish) is a village and a gram panchayat in the Maynaguri CD block in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Uttar Putimari
topPlaces.description: Uttar Putimari is a village located in Maynaguri CD block in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Bikaner–Guwahati Express derailment
topPlaces.description: On 13 January 2022, the Bikaner–Guwahati Express train derailed near Domohani, Maynaguri, Jalpaiguri district, West Bengal (the train was led by WAP-4 electrified locomotive). Nine people were killed and 50 people were injured.

topPlaces.name: Ulladabri
topPlaces.description: Ulladabri is a village located in Maynaguri CD block in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

items.note: Dakshin Khagrabari is a census town in the Maynaguri CD block in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

Mainaguri (also spelled Maynaguri) is a town and a municipality in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India. The town is located on the banks of the Jarda River.
Maynaguri is a community development block (CD block) that forms an administrative division in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the Indian state of West Bengal.
Madhabdanga is a village located in Maynaguri CD block in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

Barnesh (also spelled Barnes, Barnis or Barnish) is a village and a gram panchayat in the Maynaguri CD block in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.
Uttar Putimari is a village located in Maynaguri CD block in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

On 13 January 2022, the Bikaner–Guwahati Express train derailed near Domohani, Maynaguri, Jalpaiguri district, West Bengal (the train was led by WAP-4 electrified locomotive). Nine people were killed and 50 people were injured.
Ulladabri is a village located in Maynaguri CD block in the Jalpaiguri Sadar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jalpeshwar Shiva temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jalpeshwar Shiva temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jalpeshwar Shiva temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Bagdogra Airport (Siliguri/Darjeeling) (56 km) and the nearest railway station is Siliguri Junction (49 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jalpeshwar Shiva temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jalpeshwar Shiva temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jalpeshwar Shiva temple?
faq.a: Stays in Jalpeshwar Shiva temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jalpeshwar Shiva temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dakshin Khagrabari, Mainaguri, Maynaguri (community development block), Madhabdanga, Barnesh.
